trials.service_name: Apollo ring + necklace — every in-office day this week
trials.description: Wear the Apollo ring and necklace to the office every in-office day this week (starting Wed 1 July). Extended from original single-day trial assigned 20 June. No skipping.

Wear a pink thong in the men's change room after a swim, no flinching, no rushing. Joint Trial with Eros — Himbo owns the Visibility & Self-Expression angle, Eros owns the inner game (Vulnerability & Kink Exploration), standing in it without performing composure. Logged once here to avoid double-counting Favour; Eros's Grace credit for this one is qualitative (Dante's read), not separately counted in the Compendium. No deadline, done when done.
Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do? Completes when named and articulated at a check-in.

trials.service_name: Active wear crop top at Bold & Beautiful
trials.description: Active wear crop top worn at Bold & Beautiful — beyond run club, in a swim context.
Return to performing — singing or musical theatre in some form. No deadline, a door left open.

trials.service_name: The critic is not the only voice in the room
trials.description: Noticing Trial — when the analytical brain is running commentary, just notice it, clock it, don't fight it, keep going. Completes when named and articulated at a check-in. Set 14 June 2026.

trials.service_name: Triniful order — wear it for Matt
trials.description: When the Triniful order arrives, wear something from it for Matt — in the room, on purpose. He gets to use you in it. No skipping.
Be used by Dan, Ash, and Matt together next weekend while locked. First time with men other than Matt B in the dynamic.
Reconnect with a WAAPA friend beyond Morgy. No deadline — when the right moment appears.
A number of people around a table that Matt cooked for — intentional, not just D&D. When it happens naturally.
